name: ONTAP Not on Recommended Version
description: Detects ONTAP clusters running a software version that is not the currently recommended version. Running non-recommended versions may miss important fixes and features.
check_query: SELECT c.system_id, c.name, c.version AS current_version, k.version AS recommended_version FROM ontap_clusters c JOIN kb_software_versions k ON k.platform = 'ontap' AND k.is_recommended = 1 WHERE c.system_id = ? AND c.version != k.version
remediation_template: Cluster '{{name}}' is running ONTAP {{current_version}} but the recommended version is {{recommended_version}}. Plan an upgrade to the recommended version for optimal performance, security, and support.

name: ONTAP Version End of Support
description: Detects ONTAP clusters running a version that has reached or will reach end of support within 90 days. End-of-support versions no longer receive security patches or bug fixes.
check_query: SELECT c.system_id, c.name, c.version, k.end_of_support FROM ontap_clusters c JOIN kb_software_versions k ON k.platform = 'ontap' AND c.version = k.version WHERE c.system_id = ? AND k.end_of_support IS NOT NULL AND k.end_of_support <= date('now', '+90 days')
remediation_template: Cluster '{{name}}' is running ONTAP {{version}} which reaches end of support on {{end_of_support}}. Upgrade immediately to a supported version to maintain security coverage and vendor support.

name: StorageGRID Not on Recommended Version
description: Detects StorageGRID grids running a software version that is not the currently recommended version.
check_query: SELECT g.system_id, g.name, g.version AS current_version, k.version AS recommended_version FROM sg_grids g JOIN kb_software_versions k ON k.platform = 'storagegrid' AND k.is_recommended = 1 WHERE g.system_id = ? AND g.version != k.version
remediation_template: Grid '{{name}}' is running StorageGRID {{current_version}} but the recommended version is {{recommended_version}}. Plan an upgrade to benefit from the latest features, performance improvements, and security patches.

name: StorageGRID Version End of Support
description: Detects StorageGRID grids running a version that has reached or will reach end of support within 90 days.
check_query: SELECT g.system_id, g.name, g.version, k.end_of_support FROM sg_grids g JOIN kb_software_versions k ON k.platform = 'storagegrid' AND g.version = k.version WHERE g.system_id = ? AND k.end_of_support IS NOT NULL AND k.end_of_support <= date('now', '+90 days')
remediation_template: Grid '{{name}}' is running StorageGRID {{version}} which reaches end of support on {{end_of_support}}. Upgrade immediately to a supported version.

name: E-Series Not on Recommended Firmware
description: Detects E-Series arrays running firmware that is not the currently recommended version.
check_query: SELECT a.system_id, a.name, a.firmware_version AS current_version, k.version AS recommended_version FROM es_arrays a JOIN kb_software_versions k ON k.platform = 'eseries' AND k.is_recommended = 1 WHERE a.system_id = ? AND a.firmware_version != k.version
remediation_template: Array '{{name}}' is running firmware {{current_version}} but the recommended version is {{recommended_version}}. Plan a firmware upgrade during a maintenance window.

name: E-Series Firmware End of Support
description: Detects E-Series arrays running firmware that has reached or will reach end of support within 90 days.
check_query: SELECT a.system_id, a.name, a.firmware_version, k.end_of_support FROM es_arrays a JOIN kb_software_versions k ON k.platform = 'eseries' AND a.firmware_version = k.version WHERE a.system_id = ? AND k.end_of_support IS NOT NULL AND k.end_of_support <= date('now', '+90 days')
remediation_template: Array '{{name}}' is running firmware {{firmware_version}} which reaches end of support on {{end_of_support}}. Upgrade immediately to a supported firmware version.
